seoTitle: Scotts Head vs Seaham — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Scotts Head and Seaham. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Scotts Head vs Seaham: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Scotts Head and Seaham.
heading: Scotts Head vs Seaham — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Scotts Head, New South Wales and Seaham, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Scotts Head has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Seaham (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Scotts Head or Seaham safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Scotts Head has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Seaham scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Scotts Head scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Seaham scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Scotts Head or Seaham?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Scotts Head has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
